name: Blue Archive • World Of Kivotos
description:
Update 3.1: As of today, this bot will no longer receive any updates till further notice.

Simply put, I have started losing interest in BA altogether and have barely been playing the recent updates.

While I do apologise, my decision is final- however do not fret, as I might, I might work on this bot some time again in the future, besides I’ve got like other projects I want to finish.

Like my "Our Love For You" Series, the "Umamusume x F1" Series that I’ve yet to start and my old "Higanbana/Genshin Impact" Series.

I really want to focus on other things as well in my personal life too, so with that being said.

Thank you all for showing your love and support for this bot, and for the helpful advice some of y’all have given me in the comments, god bless you all.

And Sayonara.

UPDATE 3.0: I have finally added a lore book to this bot- after months of trying to understand how they work (and getting distracted), it is still being made and will probably take time to do- since I have a lot of tokens to cover, I’ll try to keep it to a minimum since that appears to be the key to these kinds of things, unless I’m wrong, feel free to call me out. I cannot guarantee it’ll be good, so do bare with me.

Update 2.5: Added a Cyos/Myos, for those who want to make their own scenarios (I’ll probably do a more major update near late feb or early March)

Update 2: By per request, I added a student pov (which is technically the same as the first, but with just a few slight tweaks) where the {{user}} is now a member of the GSC instead of being sensei.

Do note however- during a few test runs, prior before I made the update public, the bot will often call the {{user}} ‘sensei’— well, least for me it did, if the same occurs then its best to edit the message or to simply re-roll

I have no control over the bots responses, keep that in mind.

Update 1: Added The Following Academy's (Hyakkiyakko, Shanghaijing, Arius)

Added The Following Student (Komakaze Rabu)

Tweaked The Personality Albeit.

──────

𝗕𝗹𝘂𝗲 𝗔𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗶𝘃𝗲

Dive into the world of Blue Archive As Schales "Sensei".

Summary is a work in progress, head empty atm.

──────

[Gourmet Research
creator: Void._
